Current hardening notes

  • Canonical runtime path is locked to the product-owned shell.
  • Remote executor remains the default workspace runtime.
  • Deployment packaging emits an artifact manifest and operator handoff archive.
  • Public packet pages in this repository are generated from current proof data.

Sovereign provider evidence

  • User-owned provider profiles present: 0.
  • Encrypted-at-rest provider profiles present: 0.
  • Workspace bindings present: 0 across 0 workspace(s).
  • Provider mix: no provider profiles yet.
  • Binding roles in use: no workspace bindings yet.
  • Provider execution remains unlock-gated and user-owned with no silent founder-credential fallback in the sovereign lane.
